title: selaginella tuberosa
intro: Selaginella tuberosa, also known as the "tuberous spike moss," is a species of flowering plant in the genus Selaginella, belonging to the family Selaginellaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Selaginella tuberosa include reducing fever, alleviating coughs and colds, and supporting the immune system. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties for therapeutic purposes.
